title: Orbital Mechanics
shortSummary: How objects move in space — Kepler's laws, orbit types, transfer orbits, and the delta-v budgets that define every mission.
whyItMatters: Orbital mechanics is the language of spaceflight. Every mission — LEO, GEO, lunar, Mars — is defined by its orbit. Understanding Hohmann transfers, delta-v budgets, and orbital parameters is non-negotiable for any rocket scientist.
coreConcepts: Kepler's three laws of planetary motion
